General.Name: Sapmer
General.Description: Sapmer SA operates as a fishing company in France. The company offers Patagonian toothfish, saint paul rock lobster, and tropical tuna products. It serves wholesalers, hotels/restaurants, and individuals. Sapmer SA was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Le Port, France.
General.Address: Darse de pêche, Le Port, France, 97420
